name: Monalisa Behera
title: First-Year Optometry Student | Head of Outreach
description: Hi everyone! I'm Monalisa, a first-year Optometry student at Trilochan School of Optometry. I'm passionate about all aspects of eye health and love creating engaging content to raise awareness about the importance of optometry and proper eye care.
